mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board_comments ( post_id, designer_id, content, created_at ) VALUES ( #{postId}, #{designerId}, #{content}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.post_id AS postId, c.designer_id AS designerId, d.name AS designerName, c.content, c.created_at AS createdAt, c.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM board_comments c LEFT JOIN designers d ON c.designer_id = d.id WHERE c.post_id = #{postId} ORDER BY c.created_at ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE board_comment SET content = #{content}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
